list.name: Changes
list.comment:
## FrostJNI Integration
* Integrated FrostJNI directly into Frostfuscator under `dev.frost.obfuscator.jni`. * Added top-level `frostjni` configuration with YAML serialization support. * Integrated native generation, compilation, method patching, loader injection, and library embedding into the standard obfuscation pipeline. * Added runtime loader classes and embedded native libraries under `native/{os}/{arch}/`. * Added native protection metrics to reports and protection statistics. * Added a dedicated GUI page for Native Protection with an enable-warning dialog. * Updated documentation for Java 21, FrostJNI configuration, GUI usage, CLI usage, and compiler/toolchain setup. * Verified protection of a smoke-test application where `SmokeApp.main` and `SmokeApp.message` were converted to native methods, embedded into the output jar, and executed successfully.
## Native Protection UX
* Redesigned the FrostJNI GUI page into a compact scrollable layout. * Added built-in compiler detection directly in the GUI. * Added install shortcuts for MinGW/MSYS2, MSVC Build Tools, and Clang. * Added `useMsvc` configuration support. * Added compiler family selection:
* GCC / MinGW * Clang * MSVC * Added validation warnings when FrostJNI is enabled but the selected compiler is unavailable.
## Native Compilation Improvements
* Made `SELECTIVE` + `FAST` the recommended workflow to avoid accidental full-application native conversion. * Added unity-build compilation by default for faster native build times. * Fixed unity-build generation by isolating native cache globals per generated class. * Fixed compiler process handling by consuming stdout and stderr concurrently, preventing potential deadlocks. * Added compiler heartbeat logging for long-running builds. * Added detailed unity-build logging, including merged translation unit counts. * Verified successful selective native protection using MSYS2 MinGW with embedded DLL generation and JNI stub replacement.
## JNI Overload Support
* Fixed JNI symbol generation for overloaded methods by emitting descriptor-qualified long JNI names. * Verified native protection of overloaded methods such as multiple `choose(...)` variants in the same class. * Removed MinGW label-at-end warning spam from generated sources. * Improved fallback reporting when native compilation fails and continuation is allowed, clearly indicating that the resulting jar remains Java-only.
## Invokedynamic String Concatenation Support
* Added bootstrap metadata support to the ASM-independent invokedynamic model. * Implemented native lowering for `java/lang/invoke/StringConcatFactory`. * Added support for Java 9+ string concatenation during native conversion. * Verified methods containing string concatenation are successfully converted to native code and execute correctly.
## Bytecode Coverage Expansion
* Added `LambdaMetafactory` desugaring to convert lambda invokedynamic sites into generated helper classes before native conversion. * Added `ObjectMethods` desugaring to support native protection of generated record methods:
* `toString` * `hashCode` * `equals` * Added support for:
* Object comparison branches * Primitive conversions * Primitive comparisons * Bitwise operations * Unsigned shifts * Common stack manipulation instructions * Replaced generic conversion warnings with precise unsupported opcode/bootstrap diagnostics.
## Validation
* Successfully executed a native protection pass against the FrostCore package. * Converted **2,413 methods** to native code. * Recorded **0 conversion failures**. * Embedded a single Windows x86_64 native library. * Eliminated unsupported generated-source placeholder output.

task.summary:
Version 1.1.1
- Fixed fake classes so they no longer land in one predictable package by default. - Added configurable fake-class placement and naming modes. - Reduced Strong preset bloat by moving anti-debug guard logic into a shared helper class and skipping heavy flow on tiny methods. - Added the new Funsies category with `inject-banner` and `chinese-mode`. - Improved randomness defaults: seed `0` now means fresh randomness per run for affected passes. - Added explicit transformer priorities so fake generators run before normal obfuscation and Chinese/Funsies display passes run last. - Added `emoji-hell`, `copypasta-injector`, and `fake-application`. - Added Gradle smoke tasks: `createSmokeJar` and `runSmokeJar`. - Fixed Chinese Mode string literals to be Unicode-safe and added large banners, quotes, metadata, and final-stage injection controls. - Upgraded fake classes with interfaces, enum-like classes, inner-class metadata, static blocks, annotations, constants, arrays, switch/try-catch/loop/synchronization bytecode. - Reworked fake-code generation so no-pass output is plain functional bytecode, not pre-obfuscated bytecode: generated classes and methods no longer get synthetic/deprecated fingerprints from the generator itself. - Added larger realistic method/field pools for generic fake classes, with cache/session/config-style names and varied method signatures instead of one repeated junk method body. - Updated fake application profiles so generated classes use domain-specific method and field names, such as player/economy methods for Minecraft-style classes and controller/repository methods for Spring-style classes. - Added `chinese-mode.package-mode` with `random`, `global`, `existing`, and `none`; the default now uses random Chinese package paths instead of a fixed package. - Changed GUI choice controls to dropdowns and converted fake-class priority into a dropdown choice.

Version 1.1.1
- Fixed fake classes so they no longer land in one predictable package by default. - Added configurable fake-class placement and naming modes. - Reduced Strong preset bloat by moving anti-debug guard logic into a shared helper class and skipping heavy flow on tiny methods. - Added the new Funsies category with `inject-banner` and `chinese-mode`. - Improved randomness defaults: seed `0` now means fresh randomness per run for affected passes. - Added explicit transformer priorities so fake generators run before normal obfuscation and Chinese/Funsies display passes run last. - Added `emoji-hell`, `copypasta-injector`, and `fake-application`. - Added Gradle smoke tasks: `createSmokeJar` and `runSmokeJar`. - Fixed Chinese Mode string literals to be Unicode-safe and added large banners, quotes, metadata, and final-stage injection controls. - Upgraded fake classes with interfaces, enum-like classes, inner-class metadata, static blocks, annotations, constants, arrays, switch/try-catch/loop/synchronization bytecode. - Reworked fake-code generation so no-pass output is plain functional bytecode, not pre-obfuscated bytecode: generated classes and methods no longer get synthetic/deprecated fingerprints from the generator itself. - Added larger realistic method/field pools for generic fake classes, with cache/session/config-style names and varied method signatures instead of one repeated junk method body. - Updated fake application profiles so generated classes use domain-specific method and field names, such as player/economy methods for Minecraft-style classes and controller/repository methods for Spring-style classes. - Added `chinese-mode.package-mode` with `random`, `global`, `existing`, and `none`; the default now uses random Chinese package paths instead of a fixed package. - Changed GUI choice controls to dropdowns and converted fake-class priority into a dropdown choice.

## FrostJNI Integration
* Integrated FrostJNI directly into Frostfuscator under `dev.frost.obfuscator.jni`. * Added top-level `frostjni` configuration with YAML serialization support. * Integrated native generation, compilation, method patching, loader injection, and library embedding into the standard obfuscation pipeline. * Added runtime loader classes and embedded native libraries under `native/{os}/{arch}/`. * Added native protection metrics to reports and protection statistics. * Added a dedicated GUI page for Native Protection with an enable-warning dialog. * Updated documentation for Java 21, FrostJNI configuration, GUI usage, CLI usage, and compiler/toolchain setup. * Verified protection of a smoke-test application where `SmokeApp.main` and `SmokeApp.message` were converted to native methods, embedded into the output jar, and executed successfully.
## Native Protection UX
* Redesigned the FrostJNI GUI page into a compact scrollable layout. * Added built-in compiler detection directly in the GUI. * Added install shortcuts for MinGW/MSYS2, MSVC Build Tools, and Clang. * Added `useMsvc` configuration support. * Added compiler family selection:
* GCC / MinGW * Clang * MSVC * Added validation warnings when FrostJNI is enabled but the selected compiler is unavailable.
## Native Compilation Improvements
* Made `SELECTIVE` + `FAST` the recommended workflow to avoid accidental full-application native conversion. * Added unity-build compilation by default for faster native build times. * Fixed unity-build generation by isolating native cache globals per generated class. * Fixed compiler process handling by consuming stdout and stderr concurrently, preventing potential deadlocks. * Added compiler heartbeat logging for long-running builds. * Added detailed unity-build logging, including merged translation unit counts. * Verified successful selective native protection using MSYS2 MinGW with embedded DLL generation and JNI stub replacement.
## JNI Overload Support
* Fixed JNI symbol generation for overloaded methods by emitting descriptor-qualified long JNI names. * Verified native protection of overloaded methods such as multiple `choose(...)` variants in the same class. * Removed MinGW label-at-end warning spam from generated sources. * Improved fallback reporting when native compilation fails and continuation is allowed, clearly indicating that the resulting jar remains Java-only.
## Invokedynamic String Concatenation Support
* Added bootstrap metadata support to the ASM-independent invokedynamic model. * Implemented native lowering for `java/lang/invoke/StringConcatFactory`. * Added support for Java 9+ string concatenation during native conversion. * Verified methods containing string concatenation are successfully converted to native code and execute correctly.
## Bytecode Coverage Expansion
* Added `LambdaMetafactory` desugaring to convert lambda invokedynamic sites into generated helper classes before native conversion. * Added `ObjectMethods` desugaring to support native protection of generated record methods:
* `toString` * `hashCode` * `equals` * Added support for:
* Object comparison branches * Primitive conversions * Primitive comparisons * Bitwise operations * Unsigned shifts * Common stack manipulation instructions * Replaced generic conversion warnings with precise unsupported opcode/bootstrap diagnostics.
## Validation
* Successfully executed a native protection pass against the FrostCore package. * Converted **2,413 methods** to native code. * Recorded **0 conversion failures**. * Embedded a single Windows x86_64 native library. * Eliminated unsupported generated-source placeholder output.

MESSAGE.value:
Version 1.1.1
- Fixed fake classes so they no longer land in one predictable package by default. - Added configurable fake-class placement and naming modes. - Reduced Strong preset bloat by moving anti-debug guard logic into a shared helper class and skipping heavy flow on tiny methods. - Added the new Funsies category with `inject-banner` and `chinese-mode`. - Improved randomness defaults: seed `0` now means fresh randomness per run for affected passes. - Added explicit transformer priorities so fake generators run before normal obfuscation and Chinese/Funsies display passes run last. - Added `emoji-hell`, `copypasta-injector`, and `fake-application`. - Added Gradle smoke tasks: `createSmokeJar` and `runSmokeJar`. - Fixed Chinese Mode string literals to be Unicode-safe and added large banners, quotes, metadata, and final-stage injection controls. - Upgraded fake classes with interfaces, enum-like classes, inner-class metadata, static blocks, annotations, constants, arrays, switch/try-catch/loop/synchronization bytecode. - Reworked fake-code generation so no-pass output is plain functional bytecode, not pre-obfuscated bytecode: generated classes and methods no longer get synthetic/deprecated fingerprints from the generator itself. - Added larger realistic method/field pools for generic fake classes, with cache/session/config-style names and varied method signatures instead of one repeated junk method body. - Updated fake application profiles so generated classes use domain-specific method and field names, such as player/economy methods for Minecraft-style classes and controller/repository methods for Spring-style classes. - Added `chinese-mode.package-mode` with `random`, `global`, `existing`, and `none`; the default now uses random Chinese package paths instead of a fixed package. - Changed GUI choice controls to dropdowns and converted fake-class priority into a dropdown choice.

## FrostJNI Integration
* Integrated FrostJNI directly into Frostfuscator under `dev.frost.obfuscator.jni`. * Added top-level `frostjni` configuration with YAML serialization support. * Integrated native generation, compilation, method patching, loader injection, and library embedding into the standard obfuscation pipeline. * Added runtime loader classes and embedded native libraries under `native/{os}/{arch}/`. * Added native protection metrics to reports and protection statistics. * Added a dedicated GUI page for Native Protection with an enable-warning dialog. * Updated documentation for Java 21, FrostJNI configuration, GUI usage, CLI usage, and compiler/toolchain setup. * Verified protection of a smoke-test application where `SmokeApp.main` and `SmokeApp.message` were converted to native methods, embedded into the output jar, and executed successfully.
## Native Protection UX
* Redesigned the FrostJNI GUI page into a compact scrollable layout. * Added built-in compiler detection directly in the GUI. * Added install shortcuts for MinGW/MSYS2, MSVC Build Tools, and Clang. * Added `useMsvc` configuration support. * Added compiler family selection:
* GCC / MinGW * Clang * MSVC * Added validation warnings when FrostJNI is enabled but the selected compiler is unavailable.
## Native Compilation Improvements
* Made `SELECTIVE` + `FAST` the recommended workflow to avoid accidental full-application native conversion. * Added unity-build compilation by default for faster native build times. * Fixed unity-build generation by isolating native cache globals per generated class. * Fixed compiler process handling by consuming stdout and stderr concurrently, preventing potential deadlocks. * Added compiler heartbeat logging for long-running builds. * Added detailed unity-build logging, including merged translation unit counts. * Verified successful selective native protection using MSYS2 MinGW with embedded DLL generation and JNI stub replacement.
## JNI Overload Support
* Fixed JNI symbol generation for overloaded methods by emitting descriptor-qualified long JNI names. * Verified native protection of overloaded methods such as multiple `choose(...)` variants in the same class. * Removed MinGW label-at-end warning spam from generated sources. * Improved fallback reporting when native compilation fails and continuation is allowed, clearly indicating that the resulting jar remains Java-only.
## Invokedynamic String Concatenation Support
* Added bootstrap metadata support to the ASM-independent invokedynamic model. * Implemented native lowering for `java/lang/invoke/StringConcatFactory`. * Added support for Java 9+ string concatenation during native conversion. * Verified methods containing string concatenation are successfully converted to native code and execute correctly.
## Bytecode Coverage Expansion
* Added `LambdaMetafactory` desugaring to convert lambda invokedynamic sites into generated helper classes before native conversion. * Added `ObjectMethods` desugaring to support native protection of generated record methods:
* `toString` * `hashCode` * `equals` * Added support for:
* Object comparison branches * Primitive conversions * Primitive comparisons * Bitwise operations * Unsigned shifts * Common stack manipulation instructions * Replaced generic conversion warnings with precise unsupported opcode/bootstrap diagnostics.
## Validation
* Successfully executed a native protection pass against the FrostCore package. * Converted **2,413 methods** to native code. * Recorded **0 conversion failures**. * Embedded a single Windows x86_64 native library. * Eliminated unsupported generated-source placeholder output.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
## FrostJNI Integration
* Integrated FrostJNI directly into Frostfuscator under `dev.frost.obfuscator.jni`. * Added top-level `frostjni` configuration with YAML serialization support. * Integrated native generation, compilation, method patching, loader injection, and library embedding into the standard obfuscation pipeline. * Added runtime loader classes and embedded native libraries under `native/{os}/{arch}/`. * Added native protection metrics to reports and protection statistics. * Added a dedicated GUI page for Native Protection with an enable-warning dialog. * Updated documentation for Java 21, FrostJNI configuration, GUI usage, CLI usage, and compiler/toolchain setup. * Verified protection of a smoke-test application where `SmokeApp.main` and `SmokeApp.message` were converted to native methods, embedded into the output jar, and executed successfully.
## Native Protection UX
* Redesigned the FrostJNI GUI page into a compact scrollable layout. * Added built-in compiler detection directly in the GUI. * Added install shortcuts for MinGW/MSYS2, MSVC Build Tools, and Clang. * Added `useMsvc` configuration support. * Added compiler family selection:
* GCC / MinGW * Clang * MSVC * Added validation warnings when FrostJNI is enabled but the selected compiler is unavailable.
## Native Compilation Improvements
* Made `SELECTIVE` + `FAST` the recommended workflow to avoid accidental full-application native conversion. * Added unity-build compilation by default for faster native build times. * Fixed unity-build generation by isolating native cache globals per generated class. * Fixed compiler process handling by consuming stdout and stderr concurrently, preventing potential deadlocks. * Added compiler heartbeat logging for long-running builds. * Added detailed unity-build logging, including merged translation unit counts. * Verified successful selective native protection using MSYS2 MinGW with embedded DLL generation and JNI stub replacement.
## JNI Overload Support
* Fixed JNI symbol generation for overloaded methods by emitting descriptor-qualified long JNI names. * Verified native protection of overloaded methods such as multiple `choose(...)` variants in the same class. * Removed MinGW label-at-end warning spam from generated sources. * Improved fallback reporting when native compilation fails and continuation is allowed, clearly indicating that the resulting jar remains Java-only.
## Invokedynamic String Concatenation Support
* Added bootstrap metadata support to the ASM-independent invokedynamic model. * Implemented native lowering for `java/lang/invoke/StringConcatFactory`. * Added support for Java 9+ string concatenation during native conversion. * Verified methods containing string concatenation are successfully converted to native code and execute correctly.
## Bytecode Coverage Expansion
* Added `LambdaMetafactory` desugaring to convert lambda invokedynamic sites into generated helper classes before native conversion. * Added `ObjectMethods` desugaring to support native protection of generated record methods:
* `toString` * `hashCode` * `equals` * Added support for:
* Object comparison branches * Primitive conversions * Primitive comparisons * Bitwise operations * Unsigned shifts * Common stack manipulation instructions * Replaced generic conversion warnings with precise unsupported opcode/bootstrap diagnostics.
## Validation
* Successfully executed a native protection pass against the FrostCore package. * Converted **2,413 methods** to native code. * Recorded **0 conversion failures**. * Embedded a single Windows x86_64 native library. * Eliminated unsupported generated-source placeholder output.
